targets.rawSql: SELECT FLOOR(blob_age_hours / 12) * 12 AS "Age (hours)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*)::float, 0) * 100 AS "Success Rate %", COUNT(*) AS "Samples" FROM eigenda.retrieval_probes WHERE blob_age_hours IS NOT NULL AND blob_age_hours >= 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE total_chunks >= 1024)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*)::numeric, 0) * 100, 1) AS "Recoverable %" FROM (SELECT blob_key, SUM(chunks_returned) FILTER (WHERE success) AS total_chunks FROM eigenda.operator_probes WHERE probe_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY blob_key) sub

SELECT ob.blob_key, ob.dispersal_latency_ms, rp.success AS relay_ok, rp.latency_ms AS relay_latency, rp.probe_time FROM eigenda.observed_blobs ob LEFT JOIN eigenda.retrieval_probes rp ON ob.blob_key = rp.blob_key WHERE ob.is_self_dispersed = true ORDER BY ob.first_observed_at DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: B: 단일 장애점 (Single Points of Failure)

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', probe_time) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*)::float, 0) * 100 AS "Relay %" FROM eigenda.retrieval_probes WHERE $__timeFilter(probe_time) AND relay_key >= 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', probe_time) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*)::float, 0) * 100 AS "Operator %" FROM eigenda.operator_probes WHERE $__timeFilter(probe_time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT relay_key, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success) AS ok, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*)::numeric, 0) * 100, 1) AS "Success %", ROUND(AVG(latency_ms) FILTER (WHERE success)::numeric, 0) AS avg_lat FROM eigenda.retrieval_probes WHERE relay_key >= 0 GROUP BY relay_key ORDER BY relay_key
SELECT first_observed_at AS time, dispersal_latency_ms AS "Dispersal ms" FROM eigenda.observed_blobs WHERE is_self_dispersed = true AND $__timeFilter(first_observed_at) ORDER BY first_observed_at
SELECT snapshot_time AS time, quorum_id AS metric, hhi AS "HHI" FROM eigenda.stake_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(snapshot_time) ORDER BY snapshot_time

SELECT operator_id, quorum_id, ROUND(stake_pct::numeric, 2) AS "Stake %" FROM eigenda.stake_snapshot_operators WHERE snapshot_time = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_time) FROM eigenda.stake_snapshots) ORDER BY stake_pct DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT snapshot_time AS time, quorum_id AS metric, operator_count AS "Operators" FROM eigenda.stake_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(snapshot_time) ORDER BY snapshot_time

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', probe_time) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE kzg_verified = true) AS "Verified", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE kzg_verified = false) AS "Failed" FROM eigenda.retrieval_probes WHERE $__timeFilter(probe_time) AND kzg_verified IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', snapshot_time) AS time, AVG(signing_stake_percentage) AS "Attestation Signing %" FROM eigenda.attestation_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(snapshot_time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', probe_time) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*)::float, 0) * 100 AS "Relay Success %" FROM eigenda.retrieval_probes WHERE $__timeFilter(probe_time) AND relay_key >= 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT time_bucket('1 day', event_time) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Ejections" FROM eigenda.ejection_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Dead Operators" FROM (SELECT operator_id FROM eigenda.operator_probes GROUP BY operator_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success) = 0) sub

SELECT operator_id, operator_socket, COUNT(*) AS total_probes, MAX(error_message) AS last_error FROM eigenda.operator_probes GROUP BY operator_id, operator_socket HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success) = 0 ORDER BY total_probes DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN error_message LIKE '%version%' OR error_message LIKE '%unsupported%' THEN 'VERSION_MISMATCH' WHEN error_message LIKE '%DeadlineExceeded%' THEN 'TIMEOUT' WHEN error_message LIKE '%connection refused%' OR error_message LIKE '%no route%' THEN 'UNREACHABLE' ELSE 'OTHER' END AS error_type, error_message, COUNT(*) AS count FROM eigenda.operator_probes WHERE success = false AND probe_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY error_type, error_message ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15
